title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Guardian Pharmacy - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Department Manager with drive and ambition, Guardian Pharmacy in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Guardian Pharmacy:
Guardian Pharmacy is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Guardian Pharmacy!
